plan_set_components: Architectural plans — floor plans (all levels), sections, elevations, and construction details
Structural plans — foundation plans, framing plans, retaining wall design, connections
MEP coordination drawings — electrical, lighting, water, greywater recycling system
Solar PV and thermal systems drawings — roof layout, panel schedule, inverter coordination
Fire protection and life safety drawings — egress, emergency lighting, suppression (per BCS commercial code)
Accessibility compliance drawings — universal design compliance per NOM and BCS municipal code
Infinity pool hydraulic and structural drawings — overflow collection, equipment room, structural integration
Hydrologic setback compliance plan — stream buffer, site grading, drainage design respecting 15m setback
